title: Richly Roasted Canadian Bean Sprouts Skewers
description: A nostalgic Canadian dish featuring roasted bean sprouts, this recipe is a twist on traditional tandoor cooking, made kosher-friendly and perfect for a snack or dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Thread the bean sprouts onto skewers, leaving a small space between each sprout.
In a large bowl, whisk together the olive oil, lemon juice, garlic powder, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Add the skewers to the bowl and toss to coat the bean sprouts with the marinade.
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and arrange the skewers on it.
Roast the skewers in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until the bean sprouts are tender and lightly browned.
Remove the skewers from the oven and sprinkle with chopped parsley, if using.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
